title: Lazy Craft
description: Smooth performance, stunning visuals, and a relaxed gameplay experience.
body:
This modpack is built to be the middle ground between performance, beauty, and relaxation.

The goal is simple: take vanilla Minecraft and make it run better, look better, and feel calmer, without turning it into a completely different game. No unnecessary bloat, no extreme realism, no hardcore tech focus – just a smooth, immersive Minecraft experience that you can actually enjoy for hours.

At its core, the pack uses carefully selected optimization and rendering mods to push performance while keeping visuals clean and atmospheric. **Distant Horizons** allows for massive view distances and truly large-scale worlds, making exploration feel more natural and impressive without destroying FPS. **JJThunder To The Max** adds impactful effects and intensity where it matters, giving the game more weight without overwhelming the player.

Unlike pure optimization packs, this modpack intentionally includes light visual and gameplay enhancements to improve immersion and comfort. At the same time, it avoids intrusive mechanics, or complex systems that slow the game down or demand constant attention.
